title: Distinctive Infested Block
body:
# English. 
Now when you turn on this texture pack you will change the textures of the infected blocks.


# Русский. 
Теперь когда включите этот текстур пак у вас изменятся текстуры заражённых блоков.
 
 

Blocks in which the texture has been changed/Блоки в которых изменена текстура 

# DIB 1.14-1.20.2:

Infested Deepslate (use version 1.17-1.20.2 (Changed in DIB 1.1),
Infested Stone (Changed in DIB 1.1),
Infested Stone Bricks,
Infested Cobblestone,
Infested Cracked Stone Bricks,
Infested Mossy Stone Bricks,
Infested Chiseled Stone Bricks


# DIB 1.13-1.13.2:

Infested Stone (Changed in DIB 1.1),
Infested Stone Bricks,
Infested Cobblestone,
Infested Cracked Stone Bricks,
Infested Mossy Stone Bricks,
Infested Chiseled Stone Bricks


# DIB 1.10.2-1.12.2:

Chiseled Brick Monster Egg (Changed in DIB 1.1),
Cobblestone Monster Egg,
Cracked Brick Monster Egg,
Mossy Brick Monster Egg,
Stone Brick Monster Egg,
Stone Monster Egg


# Other versions have appeared, such as:

- VNR version
- Bare Bones version
